title: Souls-Like Death
body:
The audio file included within this pack has been sourced from the original work "Dark Souls" (available for purchase on [STEAM](https://store.steampowered.com/app/570940/DARK_SOULS_REMASTERED/) and discussed [here](https://en.bandainamcoent.eu/dark-souls/dark-souls)) created by [Bandai Namco](https://www.bandainamcoent.com/), with them retaining all rights and ownership of said sound. It is used here for comedic purposes and parody, and is not meant to compete with or detract from the sales of the original work.

Replaces the death sound and text with those from the "Dark Souls" series of games.

Includes:
- replaced death text.
- replaced death sound without strange pitch-shifting effects.
